prompt_primary.prompt_text: AIGU VALLEY landing page — full mobile screen. Sacred futuristic space entry scene. Deep black (#050510) to indigo (#1A0A3E) gradient background. Center: a luminous rotating energy portal gate — concentric rings of violet (#7B2D8E) and gold light (#E8C86A), volumetric soft glow emanating outward, misty energy tendrils. Floating star dust particles scattered throughout, slow drift. Atmosphere: solemn, ethereal, sacred space — NOT sci-fi combat. Top center: thin white glow text 'AR游伴' (27px, delicate, glowing). Bottom center: glowing energy button '进入世界' with subtle gold pulse. Bottom left: '故事' text. Bottom right: '说明' text. Minimal UI density — generous negative space. Oriental mystic sci-fi aesthetic — Eastern philosophical imagery fused with futuristic visual language. Composition: center-dominant symmetrical, portal as visual anchor. Material: energy mist, glass-like refraction, subtle neon edge glow. Motion hint: slow particle flow. VISUAL PRIORITY CONTROL RULES: [CENTER_ANCHOR] Portal gate is STRICT DOMINANT element — 60-70% of visual weight. Background must NOT compete with portal. [UI_SUPPRESSION] UI elements occupy under 15% of canvas. Top 20% of canvas: ONLY title text. Bottom 25% of canvas: ONLY bottom CTAs. No decorative elements in UI zones. [BACKGROUND_NON_COMPETITION] Background is strictly a canvas — gradient + particles only. No foreground objects. No complex textures. No competing focal points. [Z_ORDER] Strict layer separation: Background bottom → Particles → Portal → UI text/buttons on top. Portal must NOT overlap text or CTA zones.
prompt_primary.negative_prompt: phoenix, dragon, warrior, weapon, anime, cartoon, neon overglow, game UI elements, rainbow gradient, high-purity fluorescent colors, human face, text watermark, logo, realistic photo, cluttered, high UI density, asymmetrical composition, dark forest colors (#0A1A14), gold accent (#C8A24A), ink-wash style, mountain valley, fog

z_order_bottom_to_top: 2. floating_star_dust: tiny light particles, scattered, slow drift, gold/violet tint, varying opacity 0.1-0.4
3. energy_portal_gate: centered, 180x180px equivalent visual weight. Concentric rings, inner glow, violet-to-gold gradient, soft volumetric rays extending outward
4. title_text: 'AR游伴', top_center, ~60px from top safe zone. Thin white glow text, font-size proportional to 750w canvas (~27px), letter-spacing slightly wider, opacity 0.92
5. secondary_cta_left: '故事', bottom_left, ~40px from bottom, bottom_left aligned, small text, opacity 0.7
6. secondary_cta_right: '说明', bottom_right, ~40px from bottom, bottom_right aligned, small text, opacity 0.7
7. primary_cta: '进入世界', bottom_center, centered above secondary CTAs, glowing energy button style, subtle gold pulse ring, medium weight text

safe_zones.top: 60px from top edge — keep clear for text
safe_zones.bottom: 80px from bottom edge — keep clear for CTAs
safe_zones.left_right: 20px from edges — no critical content outside this margin

provider_a_gemini.notes: Gemini Flash 2.0 supports image generation. Output may need post-processing to meet exact 9:16 ratio.

provider_b_seedream.notes: Seedream supports custom 9:16 aspect ratio. Best for painterly mystic style.

payload.style: 写实厚涂 东方神秘

provider_c_doubao_jimeng.notes: 豆包/即梦 supports Chinese prompt input natively. May produce better Chinese text rendering.

output_target.format: PNG (with transparent-capable layers, though single image)

visual_priority.center_anchor: energy_portal_gate — STRICT DOMINANCE. Portal occupies 60-70% of visual weight. Background must not compete.
visual_priority.ui_suppression: UI elements (title, CTAs) occupy <15% of total canvas area. Background must NOT add decorative elements in top 20% or bottom 25% of canvas.
visual_priority.background_non_competition: Background is strictly a canvas. No foreground objects. No complex textures. No competing focal points. Gradient + particles only.
visual_priority.z_order_enforcement: Background → Particles → Portal → [All UI elements] must be strictly separated layers. Portal must NOT overlap UI zones.

post_processing.if_chinese_text_is_garbled: Generate textless version, add text overlay in post
post_processing.if_aspect_ratio_is_off: Crop to 9:16 center, do NOT stretch
post_processing.if_colors_deviate: Adjust toward #050510/#1A0A3E/#7B2D8E/#E8C86A palette — reject neon oversaturation
post_processing.if_portal_not_dominant: Increase portal visual weight, reduce background complexity

approval.gate: UNLOCKED — proceed to STEP 5 after generation
